# Runtime deps for the sve package, the demo, and data_prep.
torch>=2.4
transformers>=5.0
pillow              # sve.demo
huggingface_hub>=0.24   # data_prep downloaders
# Optional: enables the batched flash-varlen cross-attention path
# (Qwen3.5 / Qwen3-VL / GLM-4.6V). Without it the SVE falls back to a correct
# per-pair loop. Install separately: pip install flash-attn --no-build-isolation
# flash-attn>=2.8
